headline: Assessing Invitation Homes (INVH) Valuation After Extended Share Price Weakness
summary: Assessing recent price performance and business scale With no single headline event driving the move, Invitation Homes (INVH) has attracted attention after a stretch of weak share performance, including a 7.4% decline over the past month and a 22.4% negative total return over the past year. The company operates as a large single family home leasing and management platform. It reports US$2.72b in revenue and US$586.96m in net income, which gives investors a clear sense of its current...
